title: newtonia glandulifera
intro: Newtonia glandulifera, also known as the Newton's glandflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. Newtonia glandulifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional medicine in Africa, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
